titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 106: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 106. (A.R. No. 94 of 1925.) KIḺAIYŪR, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the central shrine, Vēdapurīśvara temple.

This inscription records that the peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ of Tiruvaḻundūr, a brahmadēyam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, had exempted permanently half-a-vēli and two mā of land, in two pieces of six mā each, at Tirukkuṟaiyil in Kallūr alias Tiruvampākkūr from taxes such as iṟai, echchōṟu, kāvalilpōndakuḍimai and ūr-kuḍimai in consideration of twenty-five Īḻakkaruṅkāśu received by them from an individual Kaṇṇaṉ Mallaṉ alias Udaiyamāttāṇḍa Mūvēndavēḷār, the kiḻāṉ of Nāgaṅkuḍi in Ambar-nāḍu. The latter purchased these two plots of land from two individuals Śeṟṟiyaṉ Māṟaṉ Vaḍugaṉ and Śeṟṟiyaṇ ••••• Nārāyaṇaṉ and endowed the same as tirunandavāṉappuṟam in his name Udaiyamāttāṇḍa Mūvēndavēḷār alias Karumugai-tturunandavanam for the maintenance of the personnel who plucked the flowers and plaited them into garlands for the god, Tirukkadav-uḍaiya-emberumāṉ. It is also stated here that the peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ gave an undertaking that if there was any violation, they would remit a fine of two hundred poṉ.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 309.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10 2 Ā
vatu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu brahmateyam tiruvaḻuntūr peruṅ
kuṟip perumakkaḷom Ampar nāṭṭu nākaṅkuṭi nākaṉkuṭi
kkiḻāṉ kaṇṇaṉ mallaṉṉāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇṭa
muveṉtaveḷār tamperāl tām tirukkatavuṭaiya Empe
rumānārkku Eṅkaḷ kallūrāṉa tiruvampākkūr tirukku(ṭa)ṟaiyi
l tām muṉ ceyvitta Utaiyamāttāṇṭa muveṉtave
ḷāṉāṉa karumukait tirunaṉtavaṉattukku nīr Iṟaippārkkum(t) ti
ruppaḷḷittāmam paṟippārkkum toṭuppārkkumāka tiruna
n=tavāṉapuṟamāka ceṟṟiyaṉ māṟaṉ vaṭukaṉniṭai vilaikoṇṭa
nilam Aṟumāvum ceṟṟiyaṉ pāṭṭattil ṉārāyaṇanni
ṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam Aṟumāvumāka ṉilam Araiye
Iraṇṭu māvukkum kiḻpārkkellai Iraiya nilanārāyaṇa
ṉ ṉilan tiraṉ muṉpu tiruṉaṉtavāṉa nilattukku
melkkum teṉpāṟkkellai tāṉatoṅka vākkālu va
ṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Iṉṉamit tāṉatoṅka vākkālu
kkum tirukkatavuṭaiya perumāṉ tirukkuṟaikkupāyum ṉirnakkallukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ceṟṟiyaṉ Iraiya nila ṉārāyaṇaṉ ni
lattukkum pāyum kaḷavākkālukkut teṟkkum ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa ṉilam mikitik
kuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka ṉilam Araiye Iraṇṭu mā Araiye Iraṇṭu
māvukkum veṇṭum Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum maṟṟum vācalil
poṉta kuṭimaiyum maṟṟum Ūr kuṭimaiyum kāttu
kuṭuppatāka Ikkaṇṇa mallaṉṉāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇṭa muven=tave
ḷḷārkku Ittirunan=tavāṉappuṟam cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭuttu kkoṇṭa Īḻakkaruṅkācu Irupattaiñcu Ikkācu
m koṇṭu Iṉṉilam Araiye Iraṇṭu māvukkum Iṟaiyili ceytu
kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷḷom Iṉṉilam
m potu perumakkaḷ taṭukkil Iruṉūṟu poṉ ma
tanittani taṭukkil ta pom Utaiyamāttāṇṭa muve
ṉtaveḷārkkum maṟṟum
ppaṭṭa śrī
ṟuppittu miṉṉilam Iṟaiyili
vatākavum Ipparicu Ikkācu Irupattañcuṅ ko
tirukkatavuṭaiya perumā(mā)ḷukku tirukkuṟaikkaru
māka can=tirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom tiruvaḻuntūr
pperuṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivai śrī vaiṣṇavar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
